a full (100%) low-income premium subsidy (LIPS) would pay no premium for this plan. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: BELOW_BENCHMARK 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
D = Below De minimis Amount (note —starting in 2011, this value is retired and is combined with "B") 
B = Below Regional Benchmark (2011 forward this may also mean below de minimis amount) 
N = No 
9 = Not Applicable 

COMMENT: 
The Part D premium benchmarks vary by region. The de minimis amount is
